WhyItMatters: Tracks user interaction with email-delivered URLs and helps correlate phishing delivery with click behavior.
ReviewSteps: Review delivered emails associated with URL click activity.
Validate clicked URLs, click outcome, and user interaction time.
Compare click time to suspicious sign-in or cloud activity.
Pivot on NetworkMessageId, URL, sender, and AccountUpn.
Escalate to campaign hunting if multiple recipients or repeated infrastructure are found.
ExpectedResults: Rows show delivered emails correlated with URL click activity or target-user URL interaction.
NoResultsMeaning: No email URL interaction telemetry was returned or Defender for Office 365 click telemetry is unavailable.
RecommendedActions: Validate user interaction and URL verdict.
Review Safe Links action and threat intelligence.
Pivot to identity and endpoint activity for clickers.
Consider email purge or URL block after validation.
